Off Calendar Mar-02-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James P. Cunningham, Esq., 781-7605, for defendants Sara St. James and Michael St. James, moving to strike plaintiff's claim for punitive damages
J. Michael Phelps, Esq., 433-3733, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANTS SARA ST. JAMES and MICHAEL ST. JAMES' Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Claim For Punitive Damages: DENIED, 20 days leave to answer. Notice waived. Order signed in open court.(301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
